hook.summary: A 3D rooster stands at the edge of a busy highway preparing to cross.
hook.visual_action: The rooster is positioned on a sidewalk next to a multi-lane road with fast-moving cars and trucks passing by.

scene_flow: The rooster waits for a gap in traffic at the edge of a multi-lane city road.
The rooster begins walking across the asphalt, narrowly dodging a green SUV.
The rooster continues through the middle lanes, avoiding police cars and fire trucks.
The rooster successfully reaches the grassy median on the opposite side of the highway.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy simple, high-tension arcade challenges similar to Crossy Road.
